caption: The video features Sanjeev Mohan, identified as the Principal of SanjMo, speaking at an event sponsored by MongoDB, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. The setting appears to be a professional conference or seminar, with other attendees visible in the background, some seated and others standing. Sanjeev is dressed in a formal suit and is actively engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. The lower third graphics indicate that this is part of the MongoDB World 2022 event, with hashtags #MDW22 and #theCUBE displayed, suggesting it is being covered by theCUBE media. The atmosphere is one of focused discussion, likely centered around technology or business topics related to MongoDB.
